channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: ALP commits to gas tax in policy platform to boost resource returns
item.description: The Albanese government has committed to enshrining gas tax plans within the Australian Labor Party's (ALP) policy platform, marking a significant shift towards wealth redistribution. This decision, a...

item.title: Stock market declines as tech sector struggles with earnings and AI delays
item.description: The U.S. stock market experienced a decline on Thursday, with the S&P 500 losing 0.51% and the Nasdaq Composite dropping 1.47% amid a sell-off in technology stocks. The Dow Jones Industrial Average fe...

item.title: Power Companies Request Fuel Cost Adjustment Amid Rising Fuel Prices
item.description: Power companies in Pakistan have requested a Rs1.20 per unit increase in fuel cost charges for consumers in August, citing the use of expensive imported fuels as the primary reason. Despite 75% of ele...

item.title: Community solidarity grows as Thunder Bay supports wildfire evacuees through donations and aid efforts
item.description: Residents of Thunder Bay are mobilizing to assist evacuees displaced by wildfires in northwestern Ontario. Over a dozen communities, including Armstrong, Whitesand First Nation, Namaygoosisagagun Firs...

item.title: Sekunjalo's R5.2 Billion Investment in Media Transformation and Journalism Sustainability
item.description: Sekunjalo Group has maintained a significant investment in South Africa's media industry for over a decade, with total exposure exceeding R5.2 billion. This investment includes the 2013 acquisition of...

item.title: Actor Sam Neill Dies from Pneumonia at 73
item.description: Actor Sam Neill, renowned for his roles in 'Jurassic Park' and 'The Piano,' passed away at the age of 73 due to pneumonia. His agent confirmed the cause of death and announced that a private family me...

item.title: DSWD Expands UPLIFT Program to Support Near-Poor Earners
item.description: The Department of Social Welfare and Development (DSWD) announced the expansion of its UPLIFT program to include tax-paying near-poor earners, not just the poorest Filipinos. Secretary Rex Gatchalian ...

item.title: Salihu Lukman's Political Exit and Coalition Struggles
item.description: Former ADC National Vice Chairman, Salihu Lukman, has suspended his membership of the party and opposition coalition, citing persistent hostility from Kaduna State leaders. This decision highlights a ...

item.title: Blink-182 and Pac-Man Collaborate for 25th Anniversary of 'Take Off Your Pants And Jacket'
item.description: Blink-182 have announced a collaboration with the iconic arcade game Pac-Man to commemorate the 25th anniversary of their seminal pop-punk album 'Take Off Your Pants And Jacket'. The partnership will ...

item.title: Barcelona reveals UNICEF charity event behind Messi's famous photo with baby Lamine Yamal
item.description: FC Barcelona has explained the background of the famous photograph showing Lionel Messi holding baby Lamine Yamal, saying the moment happened by chance during a UNICEF charity project organised by the...

item.title: Unions Propose Charging Non-Members for Pay Increases and Removing Strike Limits
item.description: The Australian Manufacturing Workers Union has released a Blueprint for Action ahead of the Labor party's national conference, calling for the Albanese government to address the issue of 'free riders'...

item.title: Singer Bahati Faces Legal Claims Over Alleged Organ Harvesting Accusations
item.description: A young man from Pastor Ezekiel's congregation accused singer Kevin Bahati of running an organ harvesting operation across four Kenyan counties. The claim alleges victims were taken to hospitals, had ...

item.title: Roblox Introduces AI-Powered Game Creation Tool for Mobile Users
item.description: Roblox has announced a new feature called 'Build' that allows users to create games via text prompts on their mobile devices. This tool leverages both open-source and proprietary AI models to generate...

item.title: Toaster Oven Recall Warns of Electric Shock Risk
item.description: The Canadian government has issued a recall for a specific model of toaster oven due to a significant risk of electric shock. The recall, announced by the Consumer Product Safety Commission (CPSC), af...

item.title: Congress and DMK Disagreement Over Delimitation Bill and Alliance Possibility
item.description: The article discusses the political tensions between the Congress party and the DMK as they navigate the delimitation bill. Congress leader Jairam Ramesh has dismissed rumors of an alliance between BJ...

item.title: Algeria donates educational resources to Zanzibar school, strengthening Pan-African ties
item.description: Algeria has donated over nine tonnes of educational equipment worth $600,000 to Ahmed Ben Bella Secondary School in Zanzibar, reinforcing historical ties between Tanzania and Algeria. The donation, ha...

item.title: Metropolitan launches No-Lapse Funeral Growth Plan to help South Africans with irregular incomes keep their funeral cover
item.description: This sponsored article introduces Metropolitan's new No-Lapse Funeral Growth Plan, a funeral insurance product aimed at South Africans whose incomes fluctuate because of informal, seasonal or gig-base...

item.title: Anya Taylor-Joy and Drew Starkey's Hollywood Journey and Career Success
item.description: The article explores the careers of renowned actors Anya Taylor-Joy and Drew Starkey, highlighting their paths to success in Hollywood. It discusses their breakthrough roles, notable projects, and the...

item.title: Cosmetic Surgery Risks in Central Asia Due to Poor Regulation
item.description: The article highlights the growing dangers of cosmetic surgery in Central Asia, where unregulated practices, expired medicines, and unqualified practitioners are leading to severe complications. Patie...

item.title: Andy Burnham's Manchesterism and Regional Development Strategies for the UK
item.description: The article explores Andy Burnham's political vision, known as 'Manchesterism,' which emphasizes regional development, devolution of powers, and systemic reforms to address economic disparities in the...
